message:
chore(beads): refresh stale body text across 15 beads to match corrected APIs

Body text corrections:
- LexicalIndex → LexicalSearch in 8 beads (bd-3un.17/24/30/35/36/41, bd-3w1.10/21)
- QualityOnly phase and quality_only config field removed (bd-3un.9/22/32)
- reqwest → asupersync/tls in download feature flag (bd-3w1.14)
- conn.transaction() → explicit BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK (bd-3w1 epic)
- RETURNING clause → last_insert_rowid() (bd-3w1.3)
- External content FTS5 → regular FTS5 only (bd-3w1.10)

All changes preserve existing content; only stale API references updated.
Zero dependency cycles. Health check: 0 critical, 0 warning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
